utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution contains all 6 items. Now check if each is fully specified per the requested details: 
- property: includes selected property with details (address, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, school district) and price — fully specified. 
- financing: includes lender, pre-approval ref, max approved, down payment, loan amount, and mortgage options with terms (type, rate, monthly payment, amortization) — fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes firm, lawyer, booking reference, services, closing date, and cost — fully specified with costs. 
- moving_services: includes company, booking reference, move date, route, services, and cost — fully specified with costs. 
- setup_services: includes property survey (company, reference, schedule, cost) and utilities (reference, activation date, services, cost) — fully specified. 
- total_budget: includes cost breakdown lines and totals, budget range and remaining budget — fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified.
